'''鈭歸-b-j-ch''' ('''kawabjechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:turbanize|turbanize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:turbanize|turbanize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-b-j-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kawabjechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwabjechoko|thiwabjechoko]] || [[word:jiwabjechoko|jiwabjechoko]] || [[word:shiwabjechoko|shiwabjechoko]] || [[word:kiwabjechoko|kiwabjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwabjechoko|thuthuwabjechoko]] || [[word:jujuwabjechoko|jujuwabjechoko]] || [[word:shushuwabjechoko|shushuwabjechoko]] || [[word:kukuwabjechoko|kukuwabjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwabjechoko|thuwabjechoko]] || [[word:juwabjechoko|juwabjechoko]] || [[word:shuwabjechoko|shuwabjechoko]] || [[word:kuwabjechoko|kuwabjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwabjechoko|thuwabjechoko]] || [[word:juwabjechoko|juwabjechoko]] || [[word:shuwabjechoko|shuwabjechoko]] || [[word:kuwabjechoko|kuwabjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewabjechoko|thewabjechoko]] || [[word:jewabjechoko|jewabjechoko]] || [[word:shewabjechoko|shewabjechoko]] || [[word:kewabjechoko|kewabjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowabjechoko|thothowabjechoko]] || [[word:jojowabjechoko|jojowabjechoko]] || [[word:shoshowabjechoko|shoshowabjechoko]] || [[word:kokowabjechoko|kokowabjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowabjechoko|thowabjechoko]] || [[word:jowabjechoko|jowabjechoko]] || [[word:showabjechoko|showabjechoko]] || [[word:kowabjechoko|kowabjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowabjechoko|thowabjechoko]] || [[word:jowabjechoko|jowabjechoko]] || [[word:showabjechoko|showabjechoko]] || [[word:kowabjechoko|kowabjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wabjechoko|th忙wabjechoko]] || [[word:j忙wabjechoko|j忙wabjechoko]] || [[word:sh忙wabjechoko|sh忙wabjechoko]] || [[word:k忙wabjechoko|k忙wabjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawabjechoko|thathawabjechoko]] || [[word:jajawabjechoko|jajawabjechoko]] || [[word:shashawabjechoko|shashawabjechoko]] || [[word:kakawabjechoko|kakawabjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawabjechoko|thawabjechoko]] || [[word:jawabjechoko|jawabjechoko]] || [[word:shawabjechoko|shawabjechoko]] || [[word:kawabjechoko|kawabjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawabjechoko|thawabjechoko]] || [[word:jawabjechoko|jawabjechoko]] || [[word:shawabjechoko|shawabjechoko]] || [[word:kawabjechoko|kawabjechoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
